description: CompositionWhite t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neckline with an grey fabric tape on the inseam, short sleeves, and graphic print with appliqué on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash warm at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm iron, but do not iron on designDo not dry cleanStyle and comfort at its best is what this casual t-shirt from nike offers. Made of pure cotton fabric, this tee is sure to keep you fresh and comfortable all day, while the smart print and appliqué work exudes the multi-faceted energies of the feminine you – an angel, focused and sporty. Team this with short colourful skirts or jeans and tennis shoes for unparalleled cool.
